paper_title: Estimating economic value of household municipal solid waste reduction program: A willingness-to-accept (WTA) approach

The primary research field focusing on economic valuation of environmental services.
The program evaluated for its economic value and public acceptance in the Mekong Delta.
The process of separating waste at the point of generation to improve recycling and management.
A non-market valuation method used to estimate the minimum compensation required for an individual to accept a change.
